claim: The output conforms to the GraphSpec JSON Schema (correct top-level structure, valid node types)
graphFromSpec(output) executes without throwing an error
The number of nodes is within +/-1 of the expected count for the task
All node deps reference other nodes that exist in the spec
All fn and source references exist in the provided catalogs
After receiving a validation error message, the LLM produces a corrected spec that passes validation
The requested modification is present in the new spec
No nodes were changed that should not have been changed by the modification request
